Table	Create Table
kot_queue	CREATE TABLE `kot_queue` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `orderId` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `outletId` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `kotData` json NOT NULL,
  `isPrinted` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `printedAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `orderNumber` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=180001
